caption: In an outdoor setting under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds, a group of cartoon characters is gathered. Centrally, a pale character with wide eyes and brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a green and orange starburst design, holds up a white piece of paper. The paper contains several lines of illegible, scribbled text. To his left, two characters are visible, one in a red shirt and another with long brown hair. To his right, another person in a red and white striped shirt stands close by, and a man with sunglasses and a dark blue shirt stands in the background. As the scene progresses, the central character's mouth opens wider in a shocked or surprised expression while continuing to hold the paper aloft for others to see. The surrounding characters remain relatively still, observing the action.
